description:
Download web video and audio


This release contains many bug fixes and an updated yt-dlp.
Full Changelog 📃
- Fixed an issue where the downloaded updated yt-dlp did not work correctly on some linux systems
- Fixed an issue where the app crashed when closing the add download dialog after failed validation
- Fixed an issue where URLs with whitespace were unable to be validated
- Fixed an issue where some media were incorrectly marked as audio-only
- Fixed an issue where the open button on the GNOME completed notifications was not working
- Updated yt-dlp
